creator: echotty3@gmail.com
text:
(In X.org)
1º Installed stellarium (from ports, astro/stellarium)
2º Launch Stellarium (in a konsole/uxterm)
3º Dumped this error
Segmentation fault
4º Analized with gdb program 

Core was generated by `stellarium'.                                                 
Program terminated with signal 11, Segmentation fault.                              
#0  0x0000000802764140 in ?? ()                                                     
(gdb) 

1º Installed viruskiller (from ports, games/viruskiller)
2º Launch viruskiller (in a konsole/uxterm)
3º Dumped this error
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
4º Analized with gdb program

Core was generated by `viruskiller'.
Program terminated with signal 11, Segmentation fault.
#0  0x0000000000000000 in ?? ()

This problem not only ocurred in current amd64, also FreeBSD 8.x i386 and amd64
